calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Oct-06-2009 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Sep-22-2009 Continued To Oct-06-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Sep-08-2009 Continued To Sep-22-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-25-2009 Continued To Sep-08-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion For Order Sealing Appendix Of Exhibits; Declaration; Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Sep-04-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Eckardt by Court Call for Bank of America and Harlan See.

The Court stated that it had reviewed the all the documents and that it didn't think that all the elements had been met to grant the motion. Mr. Eckardt presented additional argument to support his position. At the conclusion of counsel's argument, the Court instructed counsel to redo his order and to be more specific. Mr. Eckardt stated that he would submit another order today.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez and Deputy A. Kendall.

Notice Of Motion For Order Sealing Appendix Of Exhibits; Declaration; Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Aug-13-2009 Continued To Aug-18-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Eckardt appeared by telephone for Bank of America and Harlan See.

Mr. Eckardt did not stipulate to Commissioner Sue Kaplan hearing the matter. The matter was continued to August 18, 2009 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 to be heard before Judge John Dearman. Mr. Eckardt will appear by telephone.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.
